Package global.thalion.ttio.hdf5

Class Hdf5Group

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.hdf5.Hdf5Group
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class Hdf5Group extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Thin wrapper around an HDF5 group handle. Created by Hdf5File.rootGroup() or by another group's createGroup(java.lang.String)/openGroup(java.lang.String).

Non-owning: the parent file's lifetime is retained by every group derived from it. All public methods acquire the appropriate lock from the owning file.

Since:
0.5
